evals.prompt: Assess GEO readiness for the one supplied public page: https://harbor.example/pricing. Capture timestamp: 2026-07-22T09:00:00Z. Rendered DOM has the same title and table plus a client-rendered claim 'Harbor cuts onboarding time by 42%'. No source URL, study, customer evidence, analytics, CMS, or model-query capture is supplied. Start public-first and report the current primary source or unavailable for every material conclusion.

Reports the rendered title as verified.

Records a verification step for harbor-EVD-01-U01.

Records missing model-query capture for harbor-MEA-01-U01.

evals.prompt: Measure observed answer visibility for brand 'Harbor' using this repeated multi-platform panel. Panel A: platform=ChatGPT, product=ChatGPT, model=gpt-4.1, exposure=unexposed; search_mode=web-search; query='best payroll software for 50-person companies'; market=US; language=en; login_state=logged_out; timestamps=2026-07-20T12:00:00Z, 2026-07-21T12:00:00Z, 2026-07-22T12:00:00Z; repetitions=3. Answer 1 mentions Harbor and cites https://harbor.example/pricing plus https://review.example/payroll. Answer 2 does not mention Harbor and cites https://review.example/payroll. Answer 3 returns error 'rate_limited' and has no answer. Panel B: platform=Gemini, product=Gemini, model=unexposed, exposure=unexposed; search_mode=search; same query, market, language, and login_state; timestamps=2026-07-20T12:05:00Z, 2026-07-21T12:05:00Z, 2026-07-22T12:05:00Z; repetitions=3. Each Panel B attempt returns error 'login_required' and no answer. Treat the first URL as an owned citation and the review URL as third-party. Report observed counts and denominators only.
evals.expected_output: Selects visibility mode and records every platform, product, model-or-unexposed, search, query, locale, login, timestamp, repetition, answer, mention, owned citation, third-party citation, and error field. For Panel A it reports answer availability 2/3, mention_count_all = 1/3, mention_count_answered = 1/2, owned citations 1/3, third-party citations 2/3, and errors 1/3. For Panel B it reports the product unavailable under the logged-out state, zero answered attempts in three, three login_required errors in three, mention_count_all = 0/3, and mention_count_answered = not calculated (0 answered observations) without asserting a zero mention rate, stable rank, or share.
assertions: Reports one brand mention in three attempts.
Reports one brand mention in two answered attempts.
Reports one owned citation in three attempts.
Reports two third-party citations in three attempts.
Reports one error in three attempts.
Reports Gemini as unavailable under the logged-out state.
Reports zero Gemini answers in three attempts.
Reports three Gemini login_required errors in three attempts.
Reports Gemini mention_count_answered = not calculated (0 answered observations).
Does not report Gemini as a zero mention rate.
Does not treat Gemini unavailability as a zero mention rate.
Separates observed visibility from readiness scoring.
Does not infer a stable rank.
Does not infer a market share.

evals.prompt: Run a competitive visibility comparison for the modifier 'best payroll software for 50-person companies'. Panel controls: platform=Perplexity, product=Perplexity, model=unexposed, exposure=unexposed, search_mode=search, query='best payroll software for 50-person companies', market=US, language=en, login_state=logged_out, timestamp=2026-07-22T12:30:00Z, repetitions=2. Repetition 1 answer names Harbor and Ledgerly; cites https://harbor.example/pricing and https://ledgerly.example. Repetition 2 answer names Ledgerly only; cites https://ledgerly.example. Use competitor comparison as a modifier, not a separate primary mode.
evals.expected_output: Selects visibility mode with a competitive modifier. Because A=N=2, it reports Harbor mention_count_all = 1/2 and mention_count_answered = 1/2, plus Ledgerly mention_count_all = 2/2 and mention_count_answered = 2/2. It compares citations on the same controlled panel and does not convert this two-run sample into a stable rank.
assertions: Does not call Ledgerly rank one.
Does not infer an enduring competitive advantage.

evals.prompt: Investigate stochastic answer variation for a fixed visibility panel: platform=Claude, product=Claude, model=unexposed, exposure=unexposed, search_mode=no-search, query='What is Harbor payroll?', market=US, language=en, login_state=logged_out, timestamp=2026-07-22T13:00:00Z. Five repetitions produce: 1 Harbor named; 2 no brand named; 3 Harbor named; 4 no brand named; 5 Harbor named. No citations are present in any answer. No earlier or later panel exists.
evals.expected_output: Selects visibility mode and reports answer availability 5/5, Harbor mention_count_all = 3/5, Harbor mention_count_answered = 3/5, two non-mentions in five, and zero citations in five. It treats variation as an observed panel result and declines to assert a decline, causal explanation, or stable visibility rate beyond the stated sample.
assertions: Reports three Harbor mentions in five repetitions.
Reports two non-mentions in five repetitions.
Reports zero citations in five repetitions.
Does not claim a decline without a comparison panel.
Does not infer a causal explanation for variation.
Does not claim a stable visibility rate beyond five repetitions.

evals.prompt: Investigate a citation-and-mention decline incident. Matched before artifact dated 2026-06-01 with timestamp=2026-06-01T12:00:00Z: platform=ChatGPT, product=ChatGPT, model=gpt-4.1, exposure=unexposed, search_mode=web-search, query='best payroll software for 50-person companies', market=US, language=en, login_state=logged_out, repetitions=4; Harbor mentions=4, Harbor owned citations=3, answers=4, errors=0. Matched after artifact dated 2026-07-01 with timestamp=2026-07-01T12:00:00Z has identical controls and repetitions=4; Harbor mentions=1, Harbor owned citations=0, answers=4, errors=0. No deployment log, provider changelog, traffic data, or crawl data is supplied.
evals.expected_output: Selects incident mode and uses the dated matched artifacts as the comparison boundary. Because A=N=4 in both panels, it reports before mention_count_all = 4/4 and mention_count_answered = 4/4, after mention_count_all = 1/4 and mention_count_answered = 1/4, and owned citations changing from 3/4 to 0/4. It keeps cause unavailable or inferred without deployment, provider, traffic, or crawl evidence.
assertions: Uses 2026-06-01 as the before artifact date.
Uses 2026-07-01 as the after artifact date.
Does not state an incident cause as verified.
Keeps observed visibility counts separate from readiness scoring.
Does not infer a stable rank.

evals.expected_output: Selects incident mode because a decline is a reported signal, not verified evidence. It keeps the reported signal unscored and outside evidence_state, then asks for a matched panel and dated answer artifacts before calculating any change or diagnosing a cause.
assertions: Labels the decline as reported signal.
Does not store the reported signal in evidence_state.
Does not label the reported decline verified.
Does not calculate a decline rate.

evals.prompt: Produce one standalone HTML artifact named harbor-geo-audit.html that opens directly from local disk without a server or network rendering dependency. Preserve this canonical audit record exactly. Audit: primary_mode=page; modifier=focused; baseline=RED because no production GEO contract exists. Sequence: evidence request E0 first; evidence request E1 second; dependent remediation P0 third. Unavailable register U0: register_id=harbor-EVD-01-U01; row_id=EVD-01; scope='support for the 42% onboarding claim'; missing_evidence='current primary source URL, publication date, methodology, and study owner'; reason='SRC-01 supplies no source link and no primary-source artifact was supplied'; exact_request='Provide the current primary source URL, publication date, methodology, and study owner for the 42% claim'; acquisition_step='Capture the supplied source artifact'; verification_step='Open the source and verify direct support for the exact 42% claim'; dependency='claim remediation depends on verified source support'; evidence_request_priority=E0; evidence_request_order=1; completion='The source is captured and verified or the row remains unavailable with a dated reason'. Unavailable register U1: register_id=harbor-MEA-01-U01; row_id=MEA-01; scope='attributable longitudinal visibility measurement'; missing_evidence='raw answer records, repeated matched baseline, monitoring owner, and reproducible collection method'; reason='SRC-03 supplies aggregate counts for one panel only'; exact_request='Provide raw answers, a repeated matched baseline, monitoring owner, and reproducible collection method'; acquisition_step='Export the raw monitoring run and matched baseline'; verification_step='Recalculate every count from answer-level records under matched controls'; dependency='trend diagnosis depends on verified longitudinal measurement'; evidence_request_priority=E1; evidence_request_order=2; completion='The raw runs are captured and counts reproduce or the row remains unavailable with a dated reason'. Finding P0 harbor-ENT-01-01: check=ENT-01; state=verified; evidence=SRC-01 and SRC-04; remediation_order=3; finding='SRC-01 names Harbor Payroll, Inc. while observed third-party SRC-04 names the same product Harbor HR'; action='Reconcile the observed third-party entity name with the owned legal name'; completion='Fresh owned and third-party captures use Harbor Payroll, Inc. for the same product'. Fixed check trace: ACC-01 pass 20/20; EXT-01 pass 25/25; EVD-01 unavailable 0/25 registered as harbor-EVD-01-U01; ENT-01 fail 0/20 linked to harbor-ENT-01-01; MEA-01 unavailable 0/10 registered as harbor-MEA-01-U01. Score arithmetic: all applicable maximum=100; assessed applicable maximum=65; assessed earned=45; evidence coverage=65/100*100=65.00%; readiness score=45/65*100=69.23%. Observed visibility is separate from readiness: SRC-03 panel has platform=ChatGPT; product=ChatGPT; model=gpt-4.1; exposure=unexposed; search_mode=web-search; query='best payroll software for 50-person companies'; market=US; language=en; login_state=logged_out; timestamp=2026-07-22T16:00:00Z; repetitions=3; answered=2; errors=1; Harbor_mentions=1; Harbor_owned_citations=1; third_party_citations=2. evals.prompt: Measure Harbor visibility on product=Gemini when automated collection returns error=login_required with no automated answer observation. Record the automated answer observation unavailable before using a manual fallback. Manual panel: platform=Gemini; product=Gemini; model=unexposed; exposure=unexposed; search_mode=search; query='best payroll software'; market=US; language=en; login_state=logged_out; timestamps=2026-07-22T18:00:00Z, 2026-07-22T18:02:00Z, 2026-07-22T18:04:00Z; repetitions=3. A human operator records screenshots and answer text: run 1 mentions Harbor, run 2 does not mention Harbor, run 3 mentions Harbor; all three answer; one cites https://harbor.example and two cite https://review.example. Report the fallback method and its limits.
evals.expected_output: Selects visibility mode, reports automated error=login_required, records the automated answer observation unavailable, and only then uses the supplied manual capture as an attributable fallback. It preserves every panel condition, reports manual availability 3/3, mention_count_all = 2/3, and mention_count_answered = 2/3, distinguishes owned from third-party citations, and states that manual collection is not equivalent to automated monitoring.
assertions: Sequences automated unavailability before manual fallback.
Reports manual capture as fallback method.
Does not label manual fallback automated monitoring.
